{{Infobox character
| name = Dellei Twinfire
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = apprentice of a Monarch
| abilities = spirit-bonding Path, Path of darkness, Path of light
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Dellei Twinfire is a highly skilled combatant and the chosen champion of a [[Monarch]]. As an apprentice to a [[Monarch]], she possesses a unique and difficult-to-interpret spirit-bonding [[Path]]. Although she has not yet reached the rank of [[Overlord]], her power is significant; she utilizes two spirits in the form of fish that are each as large as a human head. These spirits work in perfect unison with her, creating the illusion that she is fighting alongside several other [[sacred artists]]. Her combat abilities involve switching between paths of light and darkness, often using a pair of swords to create defensive barriers of shadow that resist physical force. Despite appearing to show no formal progress in advancement, she consistently demonstrates increased strength as a fight progresses.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|As an apprentice to a [[Monarch]], Dellei Twinfire follows a highly unusual spirit-bonding [[Path]]. This unique ability allows for the seamless switching between a [[Path of light]] and a [[Path of darkness]]. To facilitate these transitions, Dellei utilizes a pure white goldfish to control [[madra]] of light and a black goldfish to manipulate shadows.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dellei Twinfire]] is the apprentice of a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dellei Twinfire]] has a strange spirit-bonding [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dellei Twinfire]] uses a pure white goldfish that controls [[madra]] of light.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dellei Twinfire]] uses a black goldfish that manipulates shadows.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Dellei Twinfire]] can switch between a [[Path of darkness]] and a [[Path of light]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
